lines.raw: Lesson 87 | 第87课
A car crash | 一场车祸

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Can the mechanics repair Mr. Wood's car?
lines.chinese: 机械师能修好伍德先生的车吗？
lines.raw: Can the mechanics repair Mr. Wood's car? | 机械师能修好伍德先生的车吗？
Is my car ready yet? | 我的车修好了吗？
I don't know, sir. | 我不知道，先生。

lines.english: What's the number of your car?
lines.raw: What's the number of your car? | 您的车牌号是多少？
It's LFZ 312 G. | 是 LFZ 312 G。

lines.english: When did you bring it to us?
lines.chinese: 您什么时候把它送来的？
lines.raw: When did you bring it to us? | 您什么时候把它送来的？

lines.english: I brought it here three days ago.
lines.raw: I brought it here three days ago. | 我三天前把它送来的。

lines.chinese: 啊，是的，我现在想起来了。
lines.raw: Ah yes, I remember now. | 啊，是的，我现在想起来了。
Have your mechanics finished yet? | 您的机械师修好了吗？

lines.english: No, they're still working on it.
lines.raw: No, they're still working on it. | 没有，他们还在修。

lines.english: Let's go into the garage and have a look at it.
lines.raw: Let's go into the garage and have a look at it. | 我们去车库看看吧。
Isn't that your car? | 那不是你的车吗？
Well, it was my car. | 嗯，那是我的车。
Didn't you have a crash? | 你没有出车祸吗？
That's right. | 是的。

lines.english: I drove it into a lamp-post.
lines.chinese: 我把它撞到了路灯柱上。
lines.raw: I drove it into a lamp-post. | 我把它撞到了路灯柱上。

lines.chinese: 你的机械师能修好它吗？
lines.raw: Can your mechanics repair it? | 你的机械师能修好它吗？

lines.english: Well, they're trying to repair it, sir.
lines.chinese: 嗯，先生，他们正在努力修。
lines.raw: Well, they're trying to repair it, sir. | 嗯，先生，他们正在努力修。

lines.english: But to tell you the truth, you need a new car!
lines.chinese: 但说实话，你需要一辆新车了！
lines.raw: But to tell you the truth, you need a new car! | 但说实话，你需要一辆新车了！
